_comment: SUITE-DOC (S125) reference corpus for the document_parsing MINT suite. Point INTAKE_CORPUS_DIR at a directory containing this 'document_parsing/' subdir (INTAKE_CORPUS_DIR/document_parsing/manifest.json). Each document is scored on three axes: named business fields (field_accuracy), full-text (CER/WER via reference_text), and tables (cell-set table_f1). All values here are synthetic, no real PII. The .pdf files are minimal one-page synthetic PDFs whose extracted text matches reference_text.

documents.reference_text: Acme Supply Co Invoice INV-4471 Date: 2026-07-01 Item Qty Price Widget 2 256.00 Total Due: 512.00
Patient Intake Form Name: Jordan Lee DOB: 1990-04-12 Member ID: MBR-88213 Plan: Silver PPO
